title: Queen Katharine Academy (Peterborough): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Queen Katharine Academy  URN: 145051  Notice issued to: Thomas Deacon Education Trust  Reason for issue: ‘requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Jonathan Duff  DfE regional director office: East of England  Peterborough City Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
